subcodes.first_line: The cleaving of the moon possesseth diverse meanings and is not confined to its literal interpretation. Among these meanings is dissolution [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشقاق قمر را معانی متعدده است محصور معنی ظاهره نبوده از آنجمله مقصود اضمحلال
subcodes.subjects: @rejection of Muhammad, @the Christian clergy, @symbolism, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture
